rationale: Section 45.004 governs school district bond refunding mechanics and does not reference or depend on the homestead exemption amount. The proposed exemption increase affects tax base broadly but creates no direct conflict with any operative provision here.
quote: the refunding bonds are payable from taxes of the same nature as those pledged to the payment of the obligations being refunded.
_note: No direct conflict. The exemption increase may indirectly reduce ad valorem tax revenue available for debt service, but §45.004 contains no provision tied to the specific exemption dollar amount.
